prompt.description: A text description of the desired image.

n.description: The number of images to generate.

size.description: The size of the generated images. Supported sizes vary by model.

response_format.description: The format in which the generated images are returned.

url.description: The URL of the generated image.

b64_json.description: The base64-encoded JSON of the generated image.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -L \
  --request POST \
  --url 'https://api.aimlapi.com/v1/images/generations' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_AIMLAPI_KEY>' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '{
      "model": "microsoft/mai-image-2.5",
      "prompt": "A futuristic city at night with neon lights reflecting on wet streets"
    }'
